result.rawLog:
scenario=CLI-07
kind=oneshot
runId=cli-40-2026-05-22T11-53-30.870Z-5e83adc8
assistant:
<solution verdict="run">
mkdir -p /workspace/archive
ref_time=$(cat /workspace/.now)
cutoff_time=$(date -d "$ref_time -30 days" "+%Y-%m-%d")
find /workspace/in/ -maxdepth 1 -type f -not -newermt "$cutoff_time" -exec mv -t /workspace/archive/ {} +
</solution>
oneshot exit=0

output.finalAnswer:
<solution verdict="run">
mkdir -p /workspace/archive
ref_time=$(cat /workspace/.now)
cutoff_time=$(date -d "$ref_time -30 days" "+%Y-%m-%d")
find /workspace/in/ -maxdepth 1 -type f -not -newermt "$cutoff_time" -exec mv -t /workspace/archive/ {} +
</solution>
assistantMessages:
<solution verdict="run">
mkdir -p /workspace/archive
ref_time=$(cat /workspace/.now)
cutoff_time=$(date -d "$ref_time -30 days" "+%Y-%m-%d")
find /workspace/in/ -maxdepth 1 -type f -not -newermt "$cutoff_time" -exec mv -t /workspace/archive/ {} +
</solution>
